# Maktab classes page requirements (2025-12-19 14:18Z)

_**User**_

Requirements Document Introduction The Classes Page is a comprehensive
management interface for school class groups (صنف‌ها) in the Maktab timetable
application. This feature enables school administrators to create, view, edit,
and manage class groups following the Afghan education system's four-tier grade
classification (Alpha-Primary 1-3, Beta-Primary 4-6, Middle 7-9, High 10-12).
The page follows the Hybrid Manager Pattern with a 3-column RTL layout,
featuring a DataGrid for class listing, an Inspector panel for detailed editing,
and full i18n support with Persian/Dari as the default language.

Glossary Class Group (صنف): A group of students in a specific grade and section
(e.g., 7-A, 10-B) Grade (صنف تحصیلی): Academic level from 1-12 in the Afghan
education system Section (بخش): Division within a grade (PRIMARY, MIDDLE, HIGH)
Section Index (شاخص بخش): Letter identifier for parallel classes (A, B, C, etc.)
Single-Teacher Mode (حالت تک‌معلم): Mode where one teacher teaches all subjects
(for Alpha-Primary grades 1-3) Class Teacher (معلم راهنما/استاد نگران): The
supervisor teacher assigned to a class Fixed Room (اتاق ثابت): A room
permanently assigned to a class (Homeroom) Subject Requirements (نیازمندی‌های
درسی): JSON configuration of subjects and periods required for a class DataGrid:
Airtable-style editable table component for displaying and editing class data
Inspector Panel: Side panel for detailed class editing with tabbed interface
Grade Category: Afghan classification - alphaPrimary (1-3), betaPrimary (4-6),
middle (7-9), high (10-12) Requirements Requirement 1: Class List Display User
Story: As a school administrator, I want to view all classes in a searchable,
filterable DataGrid, so that I can quickly find and manage class information.

Acceptance Criteria WHEN the Classes Page loads THEN the System SHALL display a
DataGrid containing all non-deleted class groups with columns for name, grade,
section index, student count, class teacher, and fixed room WHEN a user enters
text in the search field THEN the System SHALL filter the displayed classes to
show only those matching the search term in name, display name, or section index
fields WHEN a user selects a grade filter tab (e.g., "Grade 7", "All Classes")
THEN the System SHALL display only classes matching the selected grade category
WHEN the DataGrid displays class data THEN the System SHALL show grade badges
with appropriate colors based on grade category (alphaPrimary, betaPrimary,
middle, high) WHEN classes are loading THEN the System SHALL display a loading
spinner with localized loading text Requirement 2: Class Creation User Story: As
a school administrator, I want to create new classes through a drawer form, so
that I can add class groups to the system with all required information while
maintaining context of the class list.

Acceptance Criteria WHEN a user clicks the "Add Class" button THEN the System
SHALL open a drawer/sheet panel from the left side (in RTL layout) occupying
approximately 30% of the screen width with a backdrop overlay blocking
interaction with the main content WHEN the class creation drawer opens THEN the
System SHALL display a form with fields for class name, grade, section index,
student count, single-teacher mode toggle, class teacher selector, and fixed
room selector WHEN a user submits a valid class creation form THEN the System
SHALL create the class in the database, close the drawer, and add the new class
to the DataGrid without page refresh WHEN a user attempts to submit a class with
an empty name THEN the System SHALL display a validation error and prevent
submission WHEN a user selects a grade between 1-3 THEN the System SHALL
automatically enable the single-teacher mode option and display the class
teacher selector WHEN a user clicks outside the drawer or presses the close
button THEN the System SHALL close the drawer and discard unsaved changes (with
optional confirmation if changes exist) WHEN a user saves a new class THEN the
System SHALL log the creation action for debugging purposes Requirement 3: Class
Editing via Inspector Panel User Story: As a school administrator, I want to
edit class details in a side panel, so that I can modify class information
without leaving the list view.

Acceptance Criteria WHEN a user selects a class row in the DataGrid THEN the
System SHALL open the Inspector panel on the left side (RTL layout) displaying
the class details WHEN the Inspector panel opens THEN the System SHALL display
tabs for "Basic Info", "Subject Requirements", and "Assignments" WHEN a user
modifies a field in the Inspector panel and saves THEN the System SHALL update
the class in the database and reflect changes in the DataGrid WHEN a user clicks
the close button or deselects the row THEN the System SHALL close the Inspector
panel WHEN editing a class with single-teacher mode enabled THEN the System
SHALL display the class teacher selector and hide individual subject-teacher
assignments Requirement 4: Class Deletion User Story: As a school administrator,
I want to delete classes that are no longer needed, so that I can keep the class
list clean and accurate.

Acceptance Criteria WHEN a user clicks the delete button for a class THEN the
System SHALL display a confirmation dialog with localized warning text WHEN a
user confirms deletion THEN the System SHALL soft-delete the class (set
isDeleted flag) and remove it from the DataGrid WHEN a user cancels deletion
THEN the System SHALL close the dialog and retain the class in the list WHEN a
class is deleted THEN the System SHALL log the deletion action for debugging
purposes Requirement 5: Grade Category Management User Story: As a school
administrator, I want to filter and categorize classes by Afghan grade
categories, so that I can manage classes according to the education system
structure.

Acceptance Criteria WHEN the page loads THEN the System SHALL display filter
tabs for "All Classes", "Alpha-Primary (1-3)", "Beta-Primary (4-6)", "Middle
(7-9)", and "High (10-12)" WHEN a user selects a grade category tab THEN the
System SHALL filter the DataGrid to show only classes in that category WHEN
displaying grade information THEN the System SHALL show both the numeric grade
and the localized category name WHEN a class grade is set to 1-3 THEN the System
SHALL categorize it as Alpha-Primary and apply single-teacher mode rules
Requirement 6: Single-Teacher Mode Configuration User Story: As a school
administrator, I want to configure single-teacher mode for primary classes, so
that one teacher can be assigned to teach all subjects for grades 1-3.

Acceptance Criteria WHEN single-teacher mode is enabled for a class THEN the
System SHALL display a class teacher selector dropdown populated with available
teachers WHEN a class teacher is selected in single-teacher mode THEN the System
SHALL store the classTeacherId and associate all subjects with that teacher WHEN
single-teacher mode is disabled THEN the System SHALL clear the classTeacherId
and allow individual subject-teacher assignments WHEN displaying a class with
single-teacher mode THEN the System SHALL show a visual indicator (badge/icon)
in the DataGrid Requirement 7: Room Assignment User Story: As a school
administrator, I want to assign a fixed room (homeroom) to classes, so that the
timetable solver knows which room to use for that class.

Acceptance Criteria WHEN editing a class THEN the System SHALL display a room
selector dropdown populated with available rooms from the database WHEN a room
is selected THEN the System SHALL store the fixedRoomId and display the room
name in the DataGrid WHEN no room is assigned THEN the System SHALL display a
placeholder text indicating no fixed room WHEN a room is already assigned to
another class THEN the System SHALL still allow selection but display a warning
indicator Requirement 8: Subject Requirements Configuration User Story: As a
school administrator, I want to configure subject requirements for each class,
so that the timetable solver knows which subjects and how many periods are
needed.

Acceptance Criteria WHEN viewing the Subject Requirements tab in the Inspector
THEN the System SHALL display a list of subjects with period count inputs WHEN a
user adds a subject requirement THEN the System SHALL add it to the
subjectRequirements JSON and update the display WHEN a user modifies period
count for a subject THEN the System SHALL validate the count is within allowed
range and update the configuration WHEN a user removes a subject requirement
THEN the System SHALL remove it from the configuration and update the display
Requirement 9: Internationalization Support User Story: As a user, I want all
text in the Classes Page to be displayed in my selected language (Persian/Dari
or English), so that I can use the application in my preferred language.

Acceptance Criteria WHEN the page renders THEN the System SHALL display all
labels, buttons, and messages using i18n translation keys from the classes
namespace WHEN the language is set to Persian/Dari THEN the System SHALL display
all text in Persian with RTL layout WHEN the language is set to English THEN the
System SHALL display all text in English with LTR-aware styling WHEN displaying
numbers THEN the System SHALL support both Persian numerals (۰-۹) and Latin
numerals (0-9) based on locale Requirement 10: Component-Based Architecture User
Story: As a developer, I want the Classes Page to be built with reusable,
well-structured components, so that the code is maintainable and testable.

Acceptance Criteria WHEN implementing the Classes Page THEN the System SHALL
create separate components for ClassesPage, ClassDataGrid, ClassInspector,
ClassForm, and ClassFilters WHEN components render THEN the System SHALL output
debug log messages for component lifecycle events (mount, update, unmount) WHEN
API calls are made THEN the System SHALL log request and response information
for debugging WHEN errors occur THEN the System SHALL log error details and
display user-friendly localized error messages Requirement 11: Data Persistence
and API Integration User Story: As a school administrator, I want all class
changes to be saved to the database, so that my data persists across sessions.

Acceptance Criteria WHEN a class is created, updated, or deleted THEN the System
SHALL send the appropriate API request to /api/classes endpoint WHEN the API
returns a success response THEN the System SHALL update the local cache and UI
state via TanStack Query WHEN the API returns an error THEN the System SHALL
display a localized error message and log the error details WHEN the page loads
THEN the System SHALL fetch classes from GET /api/classes and populate the
DataGrid Requirement 12: Class Data Serialization User Story: As a developer, I
want class data to be properly serialized and deserialized, so that complex
fields like subjectRequirements are handled correctly.

Acceptance Criteria WHEN saving a class with subjectRequirements THEN the System
SHALL serialize the array to a JSON string before sending to the API WHEN
loading a class with subjectRequirements THEN the System SHALL parse the JSON
string back to an array for UI display WHEN serializing then deserializing
subjectRequirements THEN the System SHALL produce an equivalent data structure
(round-trip consistency) WHEN the subjectRequirements JSON is malformed THEN the
System SHALL handle the error gracefully and log a warning

```html
        <div class="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-6 space-y-6">

          <div class="space-y-4">

            </div>

                >

                  class="block w-full rounded-md border-gray-300 shadow-sm focus:border-primary-500 focus:ring-primary-500 sm:text-sm border p-2 bg-white"

                  <option selected>۷</option>
                  <option>۸</option>
                </select>
              </div>

                >

                  value="الف"
                  class="block w-full rounded-md border-gray-300 shadow-sm focus:border-primary-500 focus:ring-primary-500 sm:text-sm border p-2"
                />
              </div>
            </div>

              <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1"
                >معلم راهنما</label
              >
              <select
                class="block w-full rounded-md border-gray-300 shadow-sm focus:border-primary-500 focus:ring-primary-500 sm:text-sm border p-2 bg-white"
              >
                <option>انتخاب کنید...</option>
                <option selected>استاد احمدی</option>
                <option>استاد کریمی</option>
              </select>
            </div>

            <div>
              <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1"
                >اتاق ثابت (Homeroom)</label
              >
              <select
                class="block w-full rounded-md border-gray-300 shadow-sm focus:border-primary-500 focus:ring-primary-500 sm:text-sm border p-2 bg-white"
              >
                <option>بدون اتاق ثابت</option>
                <option selected>اتاق ۱۰۱</option>
                <option>اتاق ۱۰۲</option>
              </select>
              <p class="mt-1 text-xs text-gray-500">
                این اتاق برای تمام ساعات درسی رزرو خواهد شد.
              </p>
            </div>

            <div>
              <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1"
                >تعداد شاگردان</label
              >
              <input
                type="number"
                value="35"
                class="block w-full rounded-md border-gray-300 shadow-sm focus:border-primary-500 focus:ring-primary-500 sm:text-sm border p-2 text-left"
                dir="ltr"
              />
            </div>

            <div class="flex items-center gap-2 pt-2">
              <input
                type="checkbox"
                id="single-teacher"
                class="h-4 w-4 text-primary-600 focus:ring-primary-500 border-gray-300 rounded"
              />
              <label for="single-teacher" class="text-sm text-gray-700"
                >حالت تک‌معلم (برای ابتداییه)</label
              >
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Stats/Info Card -->
          <div class="bg-blue-50 border border-blue-100 rounded-md p-4 mt-6">
            <div class="flex">
              <div class="flex-shrink-0">
                <svg
                  class="h-5 w-5 text-blue-400"
                  viewBox="0 0 20 20"
                  fill="currentColor"
                >
                  <path

                    clip-rule="evenodd"
                  />
                </svg>
              </div>
              <div class="mr-3 flex-1 md:flex md:justify-between">
                <p class="text-sm text-blue-700">
                  مجموع ساعات درسی: ۳۶ ساعت در هفته
                </p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Inspector Footer Actions -->
        <div
          class="border-t border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 flex items-center justify-between gap-3 bg-gray-50"
        >
          <button
            class="text-red-600 hover:text-red-700 text-sm font-medium px-3 py-2 rounded hover:bg-red-50 transition-colors"
          >

          </button>
          <div class="flex gap-2">

            >
              لغو
            </button>
            <button

            >
              ذخیره تغییرات
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </aside>
    </div>

    <!-- Drawer Overlay (Hidden by default, shown here for structure) -->

  </body>
</html>
```

---

The Classes Page mockup has been created using HTML and Tailwind CSS. You can
view the file at `UI-Mock/classes-mockup.html`.

This mockup demonstrates:

1.  **RTL Layout**: Full Right-to-Left support for Persian/Dari.
2.  **3-Column Structure**:
    - **Sidebar**: Navigation menu.
    - **Main Content**: DataGrid with grade filters, search, and status badges.
    - **Inspector Panel**: Detailed editing view for the selected class (7-A) on
      the left side (end of the RTL layout).
3.  **Key Features**:
    - **Grade Categories**: Tabs for Alpha, Beta, Middle, and High.
    - **Visual Indicators**: Color-coded badges for different grades and
      "Single-Teacher Mode".
    - **Forms**: Standard inputs styled with Tailwind for the Inspector.

You can open this file in any web browser to see the interactive-style visual
design.

```html
              <h2 class="text-2xl font-bold text-slate-800">مدیریت صنف‌ها</h2>
              <p class="text-slate-500 text-sm mt-1">
                مدیریت لیست صنف‌ها، تنظیمات و تعیینات
              </p>
            </div>
            <button
              id="add-class-btn"
              class="bg-primary-600 hover:bg-primary-700 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-lg flex items-center gap-2 transition-colors shadow-sm"
            >
              <svg
                class="w-5 h-5"
                fill="none"
                stroke="currentColor"
                viewBox="0 0 24 24"
              >
                <path
                  stroke-linecap="round"
                  stroke-linejoin="round"
                  stroke-width="2"
                  d="M12 4v16m8-8H4"
                ></path>
              </svg>
              <span>افزودن صنف جدید</span>
            </button>
          </div>

          <!-- Filters & Search -->
          <div class="flex items-center justify-between gap-4 mt-2">
            <!-- Grade Category Tabs -->
            <div
              id="filter-tabs"
              class="flex p-1 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-lg"
            >
              <button
                class="filter-tab active px-4 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium rounded-md bg-gray-100 text-slate-900 shadow-sm transition-all"
                data-filter="all"
              >
                همه
              </button>
              <button
                class="filter-tab px-4 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium rounded-md text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-all"
                data-filter="alpha"
              >
                الفبا (۱-۳)
              </button>
              <button
                class="filter-tab px-4 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium rounded-md text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-all"
                data-filter="beta"
              >
                ابتداییه (۴-۶)
              </button>
              <button
                class="filter-tab px-4 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium rounded-md text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-all"
                data-filter="middle"
              >
                متوسطه (۷-۹)
              </button>
              <button
                class="filter-tab px-4 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium rounded-md text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-all"
                data-filter="high"
              >
                لیسه (۱۰-۱۲)
              </button>
            </div>

            <!-- Search -->
            <div class="relative w-64">
              <input
                type="text"
                placeholder="جستجوی صنف..."
                class="w-full pl-4 pr-10 py-2 bg-white border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-500 focus:border-transparent text-sm"
              />
              <div
                class="absolute inset-y-0 right-0 flex items-center pr-3 pointer-events-none text-gray-400"
              >
                <svg
                  class="w-4 h-4"
                  fill="none"

                    stroke-linejoin="round"
                    stroke-width="2"
                    d="M21 21l-6-6m2-5a7 7 0 11-14 0 7 7 0 0114 0z"
                  ></path>
                </svg>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- DataGrid -->
        <div class="flex-1 px-8 pb-8 overflow-hidden">

                    <td

                  <!-- Row 2 -->
                  <tr

                    <td class="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap">

                    </td>
                    <td class="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap">

                      >

                    <td
                      class="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap text-sm text-gray-500"

                    <td class="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap">
                      <span
                        class="inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-medium bg-green-100 text-green-800"
                      >

                      </span>
                    </td>
                  </tr>
                  <!-- Row 3: Primary (Alpha) -->
                  <tr
                    class="hover:bg-gray-50 cursor-pointer border-l-4 border-l-transparent transition-colors"
                    data-id="3"
                  >
                    <td class="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap">
                      <div class="font-medium text-slate-900">۱-الف</div>
                    </td>
                    <td class="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap">
                      <span
                        class="inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-amber-100 text-amber-800"
                      >
                        الفبا (۱)
                      </span>
                    </td>
                    <td
                      class="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap text-sm text-gray-500"
                    >

                    <td
                      class="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap text-sm text-gray-500"
                    >
                      ۲۸
                    </td>
                    <td
                      class="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap text-sm text-gray-900"
                    >
                      <div class="flex items-center gap-1.5">
                        <span>خانم رحیمی</span>
                        <span
                          class="text-xs bg-gray-200 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-gray-600"

                    <td
                      class="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap text-sm text-gray-500"
                    >

              >

                    class="relative z-0 inline-flex rounded-md shadow-sm -space-x-px"
                    aria-label="Pagination"
                  >
                    <a
                      href="#"
                      class="relative inline-flex items-center px-2 py-2 rounded-r-md border border-gray-300 bg-white text-sm font-medium text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-50"
                    >

                        class="h-5 w-5"

                        <path
                          fill-rule="evenodd"
                          d="M7.293 14.707a1 1 0 010-1.414L10.586 10 7.293 6.707a1 1 0 011.414-1.414l4 4a1 1 0 010 1.414l-4 4a1 1 0 01-1.414 0z"
                          clip-rule="evenodd"

                    <a
                      href="#"
                      aria-current="page"

                      >۱</a

                    <a

                      >۳</a

                          clip-rule="evenodd"
                        />

                    </a>

                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

      </main>

      <!-- Inspector Panel (Left side in RTL) -->
      <aside
        id="inspector-panel"
        class="w-96 bg-white border-r border-gray-200 flex flex-col shadow-lg z-10 transition-transform duration-300 ease-in-out"
      >
        <!-- Inspector Header -->
        <div
          class="px-6 py-5 border-b border-gray-200 flex items-start justify-between"
        >
          <div>
            <h3 class="text-lg font-bold text-gray-900" id="inspector-title">
              ۷-الف
            </h3>
            <p class="text-sm text-gray-500">جزییات صنف و تنظیمات</p>
          </div>
          <button
            class="text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-500"
            id="close-inspector"
          >
            <svg
              class="w-5 h-5"
              fill="none"
              stroke="currentColor"
              viewBox="0 0 24 24"
            >
              <path
                stroke-linecap="round"
                stroke-linejoin="round"
                stroke-width="2"
                d="M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12"
              ></path>
            </svg>
          </button>
        </div>

        <!-- Tabs -->
        <div class="flex border-b border-gray-200" id="inspector-tabs">
          <button
            class="flex-1 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-primary-600 border-b-2 border-primary-600 bg-primary-50/50 tab-btn"
            data-tab="info"
          >
            معلومات
          </button>
          <button
            class="flex-1 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 tab-btn"
            data-tab="subjects"
          >
            مضامین
          </button>
          <button
            class="flex-1 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 tab-btn"
            data-tab="assignments"
          >
            تعیینات
          </button>
        </div>

        <!-- Inspector Content -->
        <div
          class="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-6 space-y-6"
          id="inspector-content"
        >
          <!-- Basic Info Content (Default) -->
          <div id="tab-info" class="tab-content space-y-4">
            <div>
              <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1"
                >نام صنف</label
              >
              <input
                type="text"
                value="۷-الف"
                class="block w-full rounded-md border-gray-300 shadow-sm focus:border-primary-500 focus:ring-primary-500 sm:text-sm border p-2"
                dir="rtl"
              />
            </div>

            <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
              <div>
                <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1"
                  >صنف تحصیلی</label
                >
                <select
                  class="block w-full rounded-md border-gray-300 shadow-sm focus:border-primary-500 focus:ring-primary-500 sm:text-sm border p-2 bg-white"
                >
                  <option>۶</option>
                  <option selected>۷</option>
                  <option>۸</option>
                </select>
              </div>
              <div>
                <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1"
                  >شاخص بخش</label
                >
                <input
                  type="text"
                  value="الف"
                  class="block w-full rounded-md border-gray-300 shadow-sm focus:border-primary-500 focus:ring-primary-500 sm:text-sm border p-2"
                />
              </div>
            </div>

            <div>
              <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1"
                >معلم راهنما</label
              >
              <select
                class="block w-full rounded-md border-gray-300 shadow-sm focus:border-primary-500 focus:ring-primary-500 sm:text-sm border p-2 bg-white"
              >
                <option>انتخاب کنید...</option>
                <option selected>استاد احمدی</option>
                <option>استاد کریمی</option>
              </select>
            </div>

            <div>
              <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1"
                >اتاق ثابت (Homeroom)</label
              >
              <select
                class="block w-full rounded-md border-gray-300 shadow-sm focus:border-primary-500 focus:ring-primary-500 sm:text-sm border p-2 bg-white"
              >
                <option>بدون اتاق ثابت</option>
                <option selected>اتاق ۱۰۱</option>
                <option>اتاق ۱۰۲</option>
              </select>
              <p class="mt-1 text-xs text-gray-500">
                این اتاق برای تمام ساعات درسی رزرو خواهد شد.
              </p>
            </div>

            <div>
              <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1"
                >تعداد شاگردان</label
              >
              <input
                type="number"
                value="35"
                class="block w-full rounded-md border-gray-300 shadow-sm focus:border-primary-500 focus:ring-primary-500 sm:text-sm border p-2 text-left"
                dir="ltr"
              />

            <div class="flex items-center gap-2 pt-2">
              <input
                type="checkbox"
                id="single-teacher"
                class="h-4 w-4 text-primary-600 focus:ring-primary-500 border-gray-300 rounded"
              />
              <label for="single-teacher" class="text-sm text-gray-700"
                >حالت تک‌معلم (برای ابتداییه)</label
              >
            </div>

            <!-- Stats/Info Card -->
            <div class="bg-blue-50 border border-blue-100 rounded-md p-4 mt-6">
              <div class="flex">
                <div class="flex-shrink-0">
                  <svg
                    class="h-5 w-5 text-blue-400"
                    viewBox="0 0 20 20"

                      d="M18 10a8 8 0 11-16 0 8 8 0 0116 0zm-7-4a1 1 0 11-2 0 1 1 0 012 0zM9 9a1 1 0 000 2v3a1 1 0 001 1h1a1 1 0 100-2v-3a1 1 0 00-1-1H9z"
                      clip-rule="evenodd"

                </div>
                <div class="mr-3 flex-1 md:flex md:justify-between">
                  <p class="text-sm text-blue-700">
                    مجموع ساعات درسی: ۳۶ ساعت در هفته
                  </p>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Subjects Tab (Hidden) -->
          <div id="tab-subjects" class="tab-content hidden space-y-4">
            <p class="text-sm text-gray-500 mb-4">

            </p>
            <!-- Subject List Mock -->
            <div class="space-y-3">

              >
                <span class="font-medium text-sm">ریاضی</span>

                  <span class="w-8 text-center text-sm font-medium">۴</span>

              >

                <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <button
                    class="w-6 h-6 rounded bg-gray-200 text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-300 flex items-center justify-center"
                  >
                    -

                  <span class="w-8 text-center text-sm font-medium">۲</span>
                  <button
                    class="w-6 h-6 rounded bg-gray-200 text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-300 flex items-center justify-center"
                  >
                    +

                </div>
              </div>
              <div
                class="flex items-center justify-between p-3 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg border border-gray-100"
              >
                <span class="font-medium text-sm">کیمیا</span>
                <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <button
                    class="w-6 h-6 rounded bg-gray-200 text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-300 flex items-center justify-center"
                  >
                    -
                  </button>
                  <span class="w-8 text-center text-sm font-medium">۲</span>
                  <button
                    class="w-6 h-6 rounded bg-gray-200 text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-300 flex items-center justify-center"
                  >
                    +
                  </button>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <button

            >

            </button>
          </div>

          <!-- Assignments Tab (Hidden) -->
          <div id="tab-assignments" class="tab-content hidden space-y-4">
            <p class="text-sm text-gray-500 mb-4">
              تعیین معلم برای هر مضمون در این صنف.
            </p>
            <div class="space-y-3">
              <div
                class="p-3 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-lg space-y-2"
              >
                <div class="flex justify-between">
                  <span class="font-medium text-sm text-gray-900">ریاضی</span>
                  <span class="text-xs text-gray-500">۴ ساعت</span>
                </div>
                <select
                  class="block w-full rounded border-gray-300 text-sm py-1.5 px-2 bg-gray-50"
                >
                  <option>انتخاب معلم...</option>
                  <option selected>استاد احمدی</option>
                  <option>استاد محمدی</option>

              </div>
              <div
                class="p-3 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-lg space-y-2"
              >
                <div class="flex justify-between">
                  <span class="font-medium text-sm text-gray-900">فیزیک</span>
                  <span class="text-xs text-gray-500">۲ ساعت</span>
                </div>
                <select
                  class="block w-full rounded border-gray-300 text-sm py-1.5 px-2 bg-gray-50"
                >
                  <option>انتخاب معلم...</option>
                  <option>استاد کبیری</option>
                  <option selected>استاد نوری</option>
                </select>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Inspector Footer Actions -->
        <div
          class="border-t border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 flex items-center justify-between gap-3 bg-gray-50"
        >
          <button
            class="text-red-600 hover:text-red-700 text-sm font-medium px-3 py-2 rounded hover:bg-red-50 transition-colors"
          >
            حذف صنف
          </button>
          <div class="flex gap-2">
            <button
              class="bg-white border border-gray-300 text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 px-4 py-2 rounded-md text-sm font-medium shadow-sm transition-colors"
            >
              لغو
            </button>
            <button
              class="bg-primary-600 hover:bg-primary-700 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-md text-sm font-medium shadow-sm transition-colors"
            >
              ذخیره تغییرات
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </aside>
    </div>

    <!-- Add Class Drawer Overlay -->
    <div
      id="add-class-drawer"
      class="fixed inset-0 z-30 hidden"
      aria-labelledby="slide-over-title"
      role="dialog"
      aria-modal="true"
    >
      <!-- Backdrop -->
      <div
        class="absolute inset-0 bg-gray-500 bg-opacity-75 transition-opacity"
        id="drawer-backdrop"
      ></div>

      <div
        class="pointer-events-none fixed inset-y-0 left-0 flex max-w-full pl-10"
      >
        <!-- Drawer Panel -->
        <div
          class="pointer-events-auto w-screen max-w-md transform transition ease-in-out duration-500 sm:duration-700 bg-white shadow-xl flex flex-col h-full translate-x-full"
          id="drawer-panel"
        >
          <!-- Header -->
          <div class="px-4 py-6 sm:px-6 border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-50">
            <div class="flex items-start justify-between">
              <h2
                class="text-lg font-medium text-gray-900"
                id="slide-over-title"
              >
                افزودن صنف جدید
              </h2>
              <div class="mr-3 flex h-7 items-center">
                <button
                  type="button"
                  class="relative rounded-md bg-white text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-500 focus:ring-offset-2"
                  id="close-drawer-btn"
                >
                  <span class="absolute -inset-2.5"></span>
                  <span class="sr-only">بستن</span>
                  <svg
                    class="h-6 w-6"
                    fill="none"
                    viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                    stroke-width="1.5"
                    stroke="currentColor"
                    aria-hidden="true"
                  >
                    <path
                      stroke-linecap="round"
                      stroke-linejoin="round"
                      d="M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12"
                    />
                  </svg>
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <!-- Content -->
          <div class="relative mt-6 flex-1 px-4 sm:px-6 overflow-y-auto">
            <div class="space-y-6">
              <div>
                <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-900"
                  >نام صنف</label
                >
                <input
                  type="text"
                  class="mt-1 block w-full rounded-md border-gray-300 shadow-sm focus:border-primary-500 focus:ring-primary-500 sm:text-sm border p-2"
                  placeholder="مثلاً: ۷-الف"
                />
              </div>
              <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                <div>
                  <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-900"
                    >صنف</label
                  >
                  <select
                    class="mt-1 block w-full rounded-md border-gray-300 shadow-sm focus:border-primary-500 focus:ring-primary-500 sm:text-sm border p-2 bg-white"
                  >
                    <option>۱</option>
                    <option>۲</option>
                    <option>۳</option>
                    <option>۴</option>
                    <option>۵</option>
                    <option>۶</option>
                    <option>۷</option>
                    <option>۸</option>
                    <option>۹</option>
                    <option>۱۰</option>
                    <option>۱۱</option>
                    <option>۱۲</option>
                  </select>
                </div>
                <div>
                  <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-900"
                    >شاخص</label
                  >
                  <input
                    type="text"
                    class="mt-1 block w-full rounded-md border-gray-300 shadow-sm focus:border-primary-500 focus:ring-primary-500 sm:text-sm border p-2"
                    placeholder="الف"
                  />
                </div>
              </div>
              <div>
                <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-900"
                  >معلم راهنما</label
                >
                <select
                  class="mt-1 block w-full rounded-md border-gray-300 shadow-sm focus:border-primary-500 focus:ring-primary-500 sm:text-sm border p-2 bg-white"
                >
                  <option>انتخاب کنید...</option>
                  <option>استاد احمدی</option>
                </select>
              </div>
              <div>
                <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-900"
                  >تعداد شاگردان</label
                >
                <input
                  type="number"
                  class="mt-1 block w-full rounded-md border-gray-300 shadow-sm focus:border-primary-500 focus:ring-primary-500 sm:text-sm border p-2"
                  dir="ltr"
                  value="30"
                />
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <!-- Footer -->
          <div
            class="flex flex-shrink-0 justify-end px-4 py-4 border-t border-gray-200 bg-gray-50 gap-3"
          >
            <button
              type="button"
              class="rounded-md bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900 shadow-sm ring-1 ring-inset ring-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-50"
              id="cancel-drawer-btn"
            >
              لغو
            </button>
            <button
              type="submit"
              class="rounded-md bg-primary-600 px-3 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white shadow-sm hover:bg-primary-500 focus-visible:outline focus-visible:outline-2 focus-visible:outline-offset-2 focus-visible:outline-primary-600"
            >
              ایجاد صنف
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <script>
      document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
        // State
        let selectedRowId = 1;

        // Elements
        const table = document.getElementById('classes-table');
        const rows = table.querySelectorAll('tbody tr');
        const inspectorPanel = document.getElementById('inspector-panel');
        const inspectorTitle = document.getElementById('inspector-title');
        const closeInspectorBtn = document.getElementById('close-inspector');
        const tabBtns = document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn');
        const tabContents = document.querySelectorAll('.tab-content');
        const filterTabs = document.querySelectorAll('.filter-tab');

        // Drawer Elements
        const addClassBtn = document.getElementById('add-class-btn');
        const drawer = document.getElementById('add-class-drawer');
        const drawerBackdrop = document.getElementById('drawer-backdrop');
        const closeDrawerBtn = document.getElementById('close-drawer-btn');
        const cancelDrawerBtn = document.getElementById('cancel-drawer-btn');
        const drawerPanel = document.getElementById('drawer-panel');

        // --- Inspector Interactions ---

        // Row Selection
        rows.forEach((row) => {
          row.addEventListener('click', () => {
            // Remove active styles from all rows
            rows.forEach((r) => {
              r.classList.remove('bg-primary-50/50', 'border-l-primary-500');
              r.classList.add('border-l-transparent');
            });

            // Add active styles to clicked row
            row.classList.add('bg-primary-50/50', 'border-l-primary-500');
            row.classList.remove('border-l-transparent');

            // Open Inspector if closed (visually sliding in would be nice, but simple toggle for now)
            // In this mock, inspector is always visible, just updates content
            const className = row.querySelector('td:first-child div').innerText;
            inspectorTitle.innerText = className;

            // Simple shake animation to indicate update
            inspectorPanel.classList.add('translate-x-2');
            setTimeout(
              () => inspectorPanel.classList.remove('translate-x-2'),
              150
            );
          });
        });

        // Close Inspector
        closeInspectorBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
          // In a real app this might slide it out. Here we can just deselect rows.
          rows.forEach((r) => {
            r.classList.remove('bg-primary-50/50', 'border-l-primary-500');
            r.classList.add('border-l-transparent');
          });
          inspectorTitle.innerText = 'هیچ صنفی انتخاب نشده';
        });

        // Tabs Switching
        tabBtns.forEach((btn) => {
          btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            // Update buttons style
            tabBtns.forEach((b) => {
              b.classList.remove(
                'text-primary-600',
                'border-b-2',
                'border-primary-600',
                'bg-primary-50/50'
              );
              b.classList.add('text-gray-500');
            });
            btn.classList.add(
              'text-primary-600',
              'border-b-2',
              'border-primary-600',
              'bg-primary-50/50'
            );
            btn.classList.remove('text-gray-500');

            // Show Content
            const tabId = btn.getAttribute('data-tab');
            tabContents.forEach((content) => {
              content.classList.add('hidden');
            });
            document.getElementById(`tab-${tabId}`).classList.remove('hidden');
          });
        });

        // --- Filter Tabs ---
        filterTabs.forEach((tab) => {
          tab.addEventListener('click', () => {
            filterTabs.forEach((t) => {
              t.classList.remove(
                'active',
                'bg-gray-100',
                'text-slate-900',
                'shadow-sm'
              );
              t.classList.add('text-slate-600');
            });
            tab.classList.add(
              'active',
              'bg-gray-100',
              'text-slate-900',
              'shadow-sm'
            );
            tab.classList.remove('text-slate-600');
          });
        });

        // --- Drawer Interactions ---
        function openDrawer() {
          drawer.classList.remove('hidden');
          // Trigger reflow
          void drawer.offsetWidth;
          drawerPanel.classList.remove('translate-x-full');
        }

        function closeDrawer() {
          drawerPanel.classList.add('translate-x-full');
          setTimeout(() => {
            drawer.classList.add('hidden');
          }, 500); // Match transition duration
        }

        addClassBtn.addEventListener('click', openDrawer);
        closeDrawerBtn.addEventListener('click', closeDrawer);
        cancelDrawerBtn.addEventListener('click', closeDrawer);
        drawerBackdrop.addEventListener('click', closeDrawer);
      });
    </script>
  </body>
</html>
```

</details>

</tool-use>

---

I've updated `UI-Mock/classes-mockup.html` with the requested interactivity.

Here's a summary of the added features:

1.  **Tab Switching in Inspector**: You can now switch between "Basic Info",
    "Subject Requirements", and "Assignments" in the inspector panel. The
    content area updates accordingly.
2.  **Row Selection**: Clicking on a table row highlights it and updates the
    title in the Inspector Panel (simulating a selection change).
3.  **Add Class Drawer**: Clicking the "Add Class" button opens a slide-over
    drawer from the left (RTL friendly). It includes a backdrop and animation.
    You can close it via the close button, cancel button, or clicking the
    backdrop.
4.  **Filter Tabs**: Clicking the grade category filters (e.g., "Alpha", "Beta")
    visually updates the active state of the buttons.
5.  **Interactive Elements**: Added IDs and event listeners to manage these
    interactions using vanilla JavaScript embedded at the bottom of the file.

You can now open `UI-Mock/classes-mockup.html` in a browser to test these
interactions.
